Report.description: Root container. Pass the ordered report blocks as its only argument.

CaseSummary.description: Canonical case summary from the analysis tool. Takes no arguments.

PriorityBanner.description: Canonical priority and reasons from the analysis tool. Takes no arguments.

MissingInfo.description: Missing information from the analysis tool. Takes no arguments.

ActionItems.description: Initial actions from the analysis tool. Takes no arguments.

SimilarCases.description: Ranked similar cases from the analysis tool. Takes no arguments.

Guides.description: Ranked internal guides from the analysis tool. Takes no arguments.

Experts.description: Ranked internal experts from the analysis tool. Takes no arguments.

Escalation.description: Human escalation and the canonical follow-up question. Takes no arguments.

ReanalysisChanges.description: Changes since the previous analysis. Use only for a reanalysis. Takes no arguments.

Note.description: A short Japanese connective sentence. Never use case facts, scores, identifiers, URLs, legal or tax conclusions, or instructions.
